titleZh: 指导案例23号：孙银山诉南京欧尚超市有限公司江宁店买卖合同纠纷案
titleEn: Guiding Case No. 23: Sun Yinshan v. Nanjing Auchan Supermarket Co., Ltd., Jiangning Store
issuesEn: sale of expired food by operator
holdingZh: 消费者购买到不符合食品安全标准的食品，请求经营者或者生产者承担十倍赔偿责任的，不因其购买时是否明知食品存在安全问题而受到限制。
holdingEn: A consumer's claim for tenfold food-safety damages is not defeated by proof that the consumer knowingly purchased food that failed to meet safety standards.
